titleEn: Yamaha Agriculture adds herbicide spraying to Prospr robot
titleZh: 雅马哈农业为Prospr机器人新增除草剂喷洒功能
summaryZh: 雅马哈农业为其Prospr自主混合动力车辆平台推出了除草剂喷洒附件，扩展了该机器在果园和葡萄园中自动除草的能力。这一创新将机器人技术与精准农业结合，为智慧种植业提供了新的自动化解决方案，对果蔬种植领域的杂草管理具有实践参考价值。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了机器人技术在果蔬种植中的最新应用，为智慧畜牧行业人士提供了跨领域的技术参考，尤其是自动化除草方案的实践价值。
contentFull: Yamaha Agriculture adds herbicide spraying to Prospr robot 03-06 | Autonomous/semi-autosteering systems | NewsThe new attachment, developed with Croplands Equipment, brings weed control to the autonomous vehicle already working in vineyards and orchards across the US, Australia and New Zealand. Photos: Yamaha AgricultureYamaha Agriculture has introduced a herbicide spraying attachment for its Prospr autonomous hybrid vehicle platform, broadening the machine’s capabilities to include automated weed control in orchards and vineyards.The attachment was developed in partnership with Croplands Equipment and is designed to slot into Prospr’s existing modular architecture, allowing growers to switch between tools without significant downtime. It made its public debut at Hort Connections 2026 in South Australia.Automated nozzle activation and tank agitationWeed management has long been a labour-intensive task with tight timing requirements – delays can directly affect crop quality and yield. The new attachment aims to address that pressure through a system that automates nozzle activation, tank agitation, liquid level monitoring, and spray rate adjustments in real time based on vehicle speed. Mechanical breakaway boom arms are included to protect crops, vines, and equipment during close-quarters operation. Mechanical breakaway boom arms are included to protect crops, vines, and equipment during close-quarters operation.Growers also have flexibility in how chemicals are managed, with options for direct tank mixing or inline dosing for more precise concentration control. All configurations connect to Yamaha Agriculture’s multi-vehicle remote (MVR) interface, which allows one or two operators to monitor and manage a fleet of Prospr vehicles simultaneously.Built to performYamaha Agriculture President and CEO Nolan Paul says the herbicide attachment reflects how the platform was designed from the outset. ‘Prospr was built to perform today and for the future. It is modular, AI-powered, and can accommodate attachments made by our partners for a range of tasks’, Growers have flexibility in how chemicals are managed, with options for direct tank mixing or inline dosing for more precise concentration control.Hybrid diesel-electric drivetrainThe Prospr platform runs on a hybrid diesel-electric drivetrain, offering up to 40 hours of runtime and claiming fuel consumption reductions of up to 70% compared to conventional alternatives. The vehicle is already deployed in orchard and vineyard operations across the United States, Australia and New Zealand.Yamaha Agriculture’s broader portfolio includes AI-powered yield prediction, integrated farm management systems, and autonomous fruit packing technology. translationZh: 雅马哈农业为其Prospr自主混合动力车辆平台推出了除草剂喷洒附件，扩展了该机器在果园和葡萄园中自动除草的能力。
author: René Groeneveld
contentHtml: Yamaha Agriculture has introduced a herbicide spraying attachment for its Prospr autonomous hybrid vehicle platform, broadening the machine’s capabilities to include automated weed control in orchards and vineyards.
